title: WALL-X: Embodied Foundation Models for General-Purpose Robots
summary: Wall-X is an open-source project by X-Square Robot developing embodied foundation models for general-purpose manipulation robots, aimed at capturing and compressing continuous, high-fidelity physical interaction data to establish a direct feedback loop between model decisions and physical experience. The repository provides training and inference code for the WALL model series, including WALL-OSS-0.5 (a deployable VLA), flow-matching and FAST action variants, and WALL-WM (a World Action Model coupling future-video imagination with action prediction at semantic event boundaries). The codebase integrates LeRobot data preparation, DMuon distributed training, FlashAttention, and WebSocket serving utilities.
